# 1ai-Skills
# 987 Open-Source AI Agent Skills with Self-Evolving Meta-Skills
# https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills

## What This Is
1ai-Skills is the largest open-source AI agent skill library. 987 production-ready skills across 18 categories that enable AI agents to auto-evolve, auto-learn, and auto-improve. Each skill is a self-contained `SKILL.md` with YAML frontmatter (name, description, domain, tags, optional persona) that agents load on demand.

## Installation
```bash
npx skills add oyi77/1ai-skills
# or
git clone https://github.com/oyi77/1ai-skills.git
```

## Agent Discovery Order
1. Read `SKILLS.json` for machine-readable totals per category.
2. Read `AGENTS.md` for category descriptions.
3. For `cybersecurity/` (754 skills), read `cybersecurity/AGENTS.md` for the subdomain map BEFORE loading individual skills.
4. Load only the specific `<category>/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` you need.

Do NOT walk all 987 skill dirs. Grep `SKILLS.json` first.

## Categories (987 skills total, 18 categories)

| Category | Skills | Focus |
|---|---:|---|
| cybersecurity/ | 754 | 26 subdomains: threat hunting, forensics, pen testing, red teaming, cloud security, SOC ops, malware analysis, incident response, API security, zero trust, DevSecOps, compliance, OT/ICS, IAM |
| research/ | 25 | McKinsey-style analysis, deep research, Polymarket analyst, continuous learning, Sherlock deduction |
| core/ | 24 | Self-improvement, memory systems, orchestration, session brain, hub memory, find-skills |
| content/ | 23 | Remotion video, AI podcast, faceless YouTube, humanizer, Seedance, content generator |
| marketing/ | 22 | Marketing Ops, SEO optimizer, viral marketing, Twitter automation, email marketing |
| automation/ | 21 | n8n, WhatsApp/Telegram/Twitter bots, job hunter, scrapers, content publisher |
| development/ | 17 | TDD, systematic debugging, code review, PRD, git worktrees, brainstorming |
| agents/ | 14 | Autonomous research/review/planning/code/deploy + coding (refactor/lint/security/perf) |
| financial/ | 14 | All-in-One Finance, Wolf Finance, model builder, earnings viewer, pitch deck, TLH |
| meta/ | 13 | auto-evolve, create-skills, find-skills, performance monitor, auto-learner, evolution |
| integrations/ | 11 | GitHub, Discord, Notion, Slack (bots, webhooks, APIs) |
| operations/ | 10 | Governance, KYC, statement audit, GL reconciliation, month-end |
| mcp/ | 10 | MCP servers for GitHub, Linear, Notion, Resend, Slack, Stripe, Supabase |
| trading/ | 7 | Crypto trading bot, Polymarket fast loop, weather trader |
| devops/ | 6 | Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GH Actions, ArgoCD, GitLab) |
| sales/ | 6 | High-ticket closing, lead generation, business development |
| productivity/ | 6 | Google Workspace, calendar, email automation |
| data/ | 4 | Data cleaning, anomaly detection, viz, reporting |

## Self-Evolving System (meta/)
13 meta-skills form a self-improving agent operating system:
- auto-evolve: continuous improvement loop
- find-skills: discover community skills when local skills don't cover need
- create-skills: generate new skills when nothing exists
- skill-performance-monitor: track effectiveness in real time
- continuous-learning: confidence-weighted learning from sessions
- self-improving-agent, runtime-self-improvement: agent self-optimization
- meta-orchestrator: coordinates the loop
- (plus performance-monitor, feedback-collector, self-assessment, improvement-generator, skill-evolution, auto-learner)

## Tooling Dirs (not skill homes)
- docs/ — Setup guides (claude, cursor, opencode)
- hooks/ — Git hooks, session-start scripts, auto-evolve hooks
- manifests/ — Submission manifests for Claude App Store, OpenAI GPT Store, LangChain, HF
- references/ — Static checklists (code review, SEO, marketing, trading)
- scripts/ — Audit, install, submission, CLI utilities. Run `bash scripts/audit-skills.sh` to refresh counts.

## Skill Anatomy
```yaml
---
name: skill-name
description: Triggers and use cases.
domain: cybersecurity         # optional
subdomain: malware-analysis   # optional
tags: [tag1, tag2]            # optional
persona:                       # optional
  name: "Expert Name"
  expertise: ["Area1", "Area2"]
---
<markdown body with workflow, examples, references>
```

## Maintenance
- Add a skill: create `<category>/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`, then run `bash scripts/audit-skills.sh --write` to refresh SKILLS.json.
- Counts in README.md, AGENTS.md, and llms.txt MUST match SKILLS.json. Re-run audit before commit.
- All SKILL.md files must start with `---` frontmatter (validated by CI).
